CREATE TABLE MyContacts (FirstName VARCHAR, LastName VARCHAR, MiddleName VARCHAR, Name VARCHAR, Nickname VARCHAR, EmailAddress VARCHAR, HomeStreet VARCHAR, HomeCity VARCHAR, HomePostalCode VARCHAR, HomeState VARCHAR, HomeCountryRegion VARCHAR, HomePhone VARCHAR, HomeFax VARCHAR, MobilePhone VARCHAR, PersonalWebPage VARCHAR, BusinessStreet VARCHAR, BusinessCity VARCHAR, BusinessPostalCode VARCHAR, BusinessState VARCHAR, BusinessCountryRegion VARCHAR, BusinessWebPage VARCHAR, BusinessPhone VARCHAR, BusinessFax VARCHAR, Pager VARCHAR, Company VARCHAR, JobTitle VARCHAR, Department VARCHAR, OfficeLocation VARCHAR, Notes VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO MyContacts VALUES ('John', 'Doe', '', 'John Doe', 'JD', 'john@example.com', '123 Main St', 'Anytown', '12345', 'State', 'Country', '123-456-7890', '123-456-7891', '987-654-3210', 'http://johnswebsite.com', '456 Business Rd', 'Businesstown', '54321', 'BusinessState', 'BusinessCountry', 'http://businesswebsite.com', '321-654-9870', '321-654-0987', '123', 'Some Company', 'Manager', 'Sales', 'Office 101', 'Some notes here');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MyContacts WHERE HomeCity IN (SELECT DISTINCT HomeCity FROM MyContacts);
CREATE PROCEDURE my_csv (IN file_name VARCHAR) AS BEGIN DECLARE row_data VARCHAR; SET row_data = dbg_obj_print(get_csv_row(file_open(file_name))); RETURN row_data; END;
CREATE TABLE MyNestedQuery (ID INT, Name VARCHAR);
SELECT (SELECT Name FROM MyNestedQuery WHERE ID = 1) AS TestName FROM MyContacts WHERE BusinessState = 'BusinessState';
SELECT a.FirstName, b.Name FROM MyContacts a INNER JOIN MyNestedQuery b ON a.FirstName = b.Name;
SELECT * FROM MyContacts WHERE HomePostalCode LIKE '123%';
SELECT MAX(HomePostalCode) FROM MyContacts WHERE HomeState = 'State';
SELECT a.FirstName, b.EmailAddress FROM MyContacts a FULL OUTER JOIN MyContacts b ON a.FirstName = b.FirstName WHERE a.LastName <> b.LastName;
